description_long: This is a large, multi-story suburban house set on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with a winding gray driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a complex roof structure with multiple gables and dormers, primarily clad in dark gray shingles. The facade is detailed with a mix of light-colored siding and stonework, and the front entryway is accentuated by a covered porch supported by columns. Windows are arranged in a combination of symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with several large bay windows and smaller rectangular panes. The property includes a garage attached to one side, and the landscaping is minimal, focusing on the expansive lawn. The overall design suggests a blend of Craftsman and modern suburban architectural influences.
description: A large, multi-story suburban house with a complex gabled roof, light siding, stone accents, and a winding driveway on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, columns, and the winding driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, side entry, and the extension of the driveway around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the continuation of the lawn behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary side of the house, garage, and the driveway extending away from the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door
